globalRules.identity: Original geometric language only; no Pi or third-party protocol logos, copied palettes, mascots, masks, or branded silhouettes.
globalRules.stateRedundancy: Every essential state combines color with icon, shape, border, pattern, or text in the runtime UI.
globalRules.motion: Anticipation is short and non-essential; reduced motion presents the final state instantly with a stable label.
globalRules.naming: family-object-state[-variant].svg using lowercase kebab case. Runtime-only text and symbols are never embedded in SVG templates.

mechanics.idleVisual: A neutral double-ring orb shell with an empty transparent center.
mechanics.activeVisual: Outer ring brightens and the runtime direction marker moves outside the empty center.
mechanics.warningVisual: Segmented outer rim plus steady amber corner ticks.
mechanics.successVisual: Two expanding outline rings that settle back into the shell.
mechanics.failureVisual: Shell segments separate slightly and show a crossed boundary; the center remains empty.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Small shell outline with state-specific shield, magnet, or charge bars outside it.
mechanics.portalStyle: Neutral circular socket sized around the shell without a protocol mark.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Detached effect cells that orbit only after collection.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Geometric blockers that never resemble a face, mask, or logo.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Outer rim compresses by four percent before directional movement.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Outline echo expands once and fades within 240 milliseconds.
mechanics.animationFailure: Segments offset once without shake or flashing.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Switch border and state label instantly; no scale, orbit, or echo.

mechanics.idleVisual: Stacked record slots with identical corner indices.
mechanics.activeVisual: A new record outline travels across replica panels.
mechanics.warningVisual: Diverged slot uses hatch and broken alignment marks.
mechanics.successVisual: Matching panels share one solid baseline.
mechanics.failureVisual: The mismatched record separates with a crossed integrity mark.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Replica count plus matched-record fraction.
mechanics.portalStyle: Layered rectangular archive gate.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Signed record card with a generic corner notch.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Malformed or out-of-order record card.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Empty slot outline appears before propagation.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Panel baselines connect once.
mechanics.animationFailure: Diverged slot shifts to an error rail.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Show side-by-side final panels with Match or Diverged runtime labels.

mechanics.idleVisual: Faceted block with an unfilled parent socket.
mechanics.activeVisual: Small deterministic particles converge into a fingerprint ribbon.
mechanics.warningVisual: Parent ribbon becomes dashed and offset.
mechanics.successVisual: Parent and child sockets lock with a double boundary.
mechanics.failureVisual: Hash ribbon ends in a broken-link icon.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Short fingerprint strip and link state.
mechanics.portalStyle: Hexagonal hash aperture without letters or chain branding.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Nonce tile or parent-fingerprint tile.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Tampered block with misaligned facets.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Facets contract toward the fingerprint strip.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Socket closes and remains solid.
mechanics.animationFailure: Ribbon splits once at the mismatch point.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Instantly display linked or broken state with the parent fingerprint visible.

mechanics.idleVisual: Discrete notched output capsule marked available by an open corner.
mechanics.activeVisual: Selected capsule enters an input socket and gains a solid edge.
mechanics.warningVisual: Insufficient target uses an amber meter and dotted socket.
mechanics.successVisual: Consumed inputs lock as spent and new outputs appear in separate sockets.
mechanics.failureVisual: Reused capsule shows crosshatch and a double-spend blocker.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Selected fictional value and input count.
mechanics.portalStyle: Transaction gate with input sockets on one side and output sockets on the other.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Available output capsule; state never relies on orange alone.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Spent output capsule with crosshatch.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Input sockets highlight before selection.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Old capsules close and new capsules appear without explosion.
mechanics.animationFailure: Spent blocker remains fixed while route is outlined invalid.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Update available, selected, spent, invalid, and confirmed runtime labels instantly.

mechanics.idleVisual: Addressable state card with balance bar and sequence dial shapes.
mechanics.activeVisual: Authorized update highlights only fields touched by the transaction.
mechanics.warningVisual: Stale sequence dial uses an offset pointer and amber border.
mechanics.successVisual: New state locks and sequence advances one notch.
mechanics.failureVisual: Tentative fields return to their prior positions under a revert bracket.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Account state summary and expected sequence.
mechanics.portalStyle: Card-shaped state gateway with an authorization slot.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Generic update instruction card.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Stale nonce or unauthorized update card.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Touched fields receive a steady focus outline.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Sequence dial advances and stops.
mechanics.animationFailure: Prior-state bracket becomes solid while tentative fields clear.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Show Before and After cards side by side with changed fields listed.

mechanics.idleVisual: Stacked rectangular resource cells beside a neutral gauge.
mechanics.activeVisual: One cell changes to an outlined consumed slot per operation.
mechanics.warningVisual: Last two cells use diagonal amber ticks and a Low runtime label.
mechanics.successVisual: Remaining cells lock beside a committed check.
mechanics.failureVisual: Empty gauge shows Out of gas and a closed operation gate.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Numeric abstract-cell count plus segmented gauge.
mechanics.portalStyle: Operation toll gate showing fixed fictional cost.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Generic gas cell with no token symbol.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: High-cost operation gate or invalid call.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Next-cost cells receive a boundary preview.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Consumed cells settle into empty outlines.
mechanics.animationFailure: Gate closes; no explosion, shake, or fee imagery.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Change the numeric value and segmented fill instantly.

mechanics.idleVisual: Rule chamber with input ports and a closed commit port.
mechanics.activeVisual: Current condition receives a numbered runtime focus ring.
mechanics.warningVisual: Unsatisfied precondition uses a triangular marker and text summary.
mechanics.successVisual: Commit port opens and the new-state card becomes solid.
mechanics.failureVisual: Revert bracket restores the prior-state card.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Current rule step and execution state.
mechanics.portalStyle: Logic gate with visible precondition sockets.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Instruction or approved input card.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Invalid call card or unsatisfied condition blocker.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Input ports illuminate in evaluation order.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Commit port changes from outline to solid once.
mechanics.animationFailure: Tentative output clears under a steady revert marker.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: List evaluated conditions and show committed or reverted final state.

mechanics.idleVisual: Linked action capsules inside one enclosing commit ring.
mechanics.activeVisual: Capsules evaluate in order while the outer ring stays open.
mechanics.warningVisual: One failing capsule uses a notched border and blocks the whole ring.
mechanics.successVisual: The enclosing ring closes around every successful capsule.
mechanics.failureVisual: Every tentative capsule returns to outline state together.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Completed steps over total and atomic boundary status.
mechanics.portalStyle: Single commit aperture spanning all action lanes.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Ordered instruction capsule.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Missing or failing instruction socket.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Outer ring draws to 80 percent before evaluation.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Ring closes once with no repeated pulse.
mechanics.animationFailure: Tentative fills clear simultaneously.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Show all steps in a table and one Committed or Reverted result.

mechanics.idleVisual: Node ring with empty vote segments and shape-coded organization marker.
mechanics.activeVisual: Vote segment fills and local threshold bracket becomes visible.
mechanics.warningVisual: Blocking set or split quorum uses dashed group boundaries.
mechanics.successVisual: Intersecting quorum region gains a solid double outline.
mechanics.failureVisual: Disjoint groups separate with a Split runtime label.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Local threshold, quorum count, and intersection result.
mechanics.portalStyle: Threshold ring that opens only on the modeled certificate.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Authenticated vote capsule.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Contradictory vote or unavailable-node barrier.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Candidate quorum boundary is drawn before voting.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Intersection core brightens once and stays outlined.
mechanics.animationFailure: Group boundaries become dashed and remain separated.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Present static node sets with counts and an Intersects or Split label.

mechanics.idleVisual: Directed dependency edges between generic shape-coded nodes.
mechanics.activeVisual: Selected dependency path becomes solid and gains arrowheads.
mechanics.warningVisual: Single dependency point uses concentric amber brackets.
mechanics.successVisual: Independent paths display distinct patterns and a resilient label.
mechanics.failureVisual: Disconnected component uses a broken boundary and partition label.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Reachable nodes, independent groups, and concentration warning.
mechanics.portalStyle: Graph aperture requiring defined connectivity constraints.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Dependency edge token with source and destination shapes.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Centralized bottleneck or unreachable-node marker.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Potential edge appears dotted before placement.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Independent paths become solid in sequence.
mechanics.animationFailure: Partition boundary appears without node shaking.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Static graph plus a textual dependency and resilience summary.

mechanics.idleVisual: Open checkpoint ring labeled provisional at runtime.
mechanics.activeVisual: Vote segments or confirmation layers accumulate according to the named model.
mechanics.warningVisual: Reorganization branch or missing certificate uses amber fork marks.
mechanics.successVisual: Deterministic mode closes a seal; probabilistic mode reaches a scenario-specific policy ring.
mechanics.failureVisual: Provisional result is crossed out or reorganized to another branch.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Named finality model plus certificate or confirmation-policy state.
mechanics.portalStyle: Checkpoint gate with either a certificate socket or layered rings.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Attestation segment or confirmation layer.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Competing branch or premature-release marker.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Next required certificate segment or layer is previewed.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Seal closes or policy ring becomes solid once.
mechanics.animationFailure: Affected branch changes to a crossed outline.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Show Provisional, Final, or Accepted by scenario policy as text with static icon.

mechanics.idleVisual: Several execution rails with dependency markers above each job.
mechanics.activeVisual: Independent jobs fill their rails at the same rate.
mechanics.warningVisual: Matching write markers connect through a conflict bracket.
mechanics.successVisual: Parallel results converge into one deterministic commit bar.
mechanics.failureVisual: Unresolved conflict shows crossed write markers and blocks commit.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Running lanes, queued conflicts, and completed jobs.
mechanics.portalStyle: Scheduler gate with parallel and serial output rails.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Job capsule with read and write shape markers.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Write conflict wall or contention queue.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Dependency threads draw before dispatch.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Finished rails merge into one commit bar.
mechanics.animationFailure: Conflict bracket remains steady and names both jobs.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Use a static schedule table with Independent, Ordered, or Conflict states.

mechanics.idleVisual: Covered witness board with visible public-statement frame.
mechanics.activeVisual: Only commitment and proof outlines move toward the verifier.
mechanics.warningVisual: Over-disclosure path uses an open-eye outline plus text warning.
mechanics.successVisual: Verifier accepts while the witness cover remains closed.
mechanics.failureVisual: Invalid proof is rejected or an exposed witness tile receives a privacy warning.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Disclosure count, proof state, and protected fields.
mechanics.portalStyle: Verifier aperture with separate public-input and proof sockets.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Commitment orb or fictional shielded note.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Repeated spend marker or unnecessary disclosure beam.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Public-input sockets highlight without revealing the witness.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Proof outline becomes solid; cover does not move.
mechanics.animationFailure: Rejected proof moves to an error slot without exposing hidden data.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Keep witness board covered and show Proof valid or invalid as text.

mechanics.idleVisual: Transparent geometric prism with separate public-input sockets.
mechanics.activeVisual: Abstract trace facets align inside the prism.
mechanics.warningVisual: Mismatched public input uses an offset socket and amber notch.
mechanics.successVisual: Verifier outline and proof facets share one solid contour.
mechanics.failureVisual: Proof contour fragments into stable crossed pieces.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Proof readiness and public-input match state.
mechanics.portalStyle: Verification aperture with no eye, lock, or branded mark.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Proof fragment with distinct geometric edge.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Malformed proof fragment or wrong public input.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Empty prism facets appear before assembly.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Facets lock once into the verifier contour.
mechanics.animationFailure: Facets remain separated with a mismatch label.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Display proof and public inputs in a static checklist.

mechanics.idleVisual: Stack of small transaction cards entering a compressed batch capsule.
mechanics.activeVisual: Batch moves between execution, proof or challenge, and settlement rails.
mechanics.warningVisual: Optimistic assertion shows a challenge clock; ZK batch shows a proof-pending bracket.
mechanics.successVisual: Base-layer anchor accepts the resolved assertion or verified proof.
mechanics.failureVisual: Faulty assertion is crossed out or invalid proof remains outside the anchor.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Named rollup family, batch state, and settlement state.
mechanics.portalStyle: Base-layer anchor gate with separate challenge and proof sockets.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Compressed batch capsule or state commitment.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Invalid assertion, missing data, or wrong proof gate.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Transaction cards align before compression.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Anchor contour becomes solid after the appropriate verification path.
mechanics.animationFailure: Batch stays outside settlement with its failed rule labeled.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Show Execution, Verification, and Settlement as a static three-step flow.

mechanics.idleVisual: Source and destination gates separated by a neutral channel rail.
mechanics.activeVisual: Message capsule carries a proof envelope and sequence notch.
mechanics.warningVisual: Timeout clock, duplicate notch, or wrong-destination bracket.
mechanics.successVisual: Destination verifier accepts and returns an acknowledgement capsule.
mechanics.failureVisual: Message is rejected into a side rail with its failed check visible.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Source, destination, sequence, proof, and timeout status.
mechanics.portalStyle: Paired geometric gates with distinct shape codes, never protocol logos.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Message or acknowledgement capsule.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Replay barrier, expired packet, or mismatched verifier.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Source commitment and destination socket highlight together.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Acknowledgement returns once along a separate rail.
mechanics.animationFailure: Capsule stops at verifier and moves to the labeled rejection rail.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Use a static packet table with source, destination, sequence, proof, and result.

mechanics.idleVisual: Node map with available edges shown as thin patterned rails.
mechanics.activeVisual: Selected path becomes solid and displays ordered checkpoints.
mechanics.warningVisual: Unavailable edge or capacity limit uses a closed bracket.
mechanics.successVisual: Origin and destination share a completed path outline.
mechanics.failureVisual: Dead end receives a route-rejected marker and retains the last valid node.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Current node, route length, constraints, and destination.
mechanics.portalStyle: Directional junction with shape-coded destinations.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Route permit, acknowledgement, or capacity cell.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Closed edge, insufficient capacity, or invalid destination.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Candidate edges receive a dotted preview.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Path fills from source to destination once.
mechanics.animationFailure: Invalid edge stays outlined and the last valid node remains focused.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Update the selected path as a static ordered list and map outline.

mechanics.idleVisual: Several shape-coded sensor beacons around an aggregation lens.
mechanics.activeVisual: Timestamped fictional reports enter the lens.
mechanics.warningVisual: Stale report uses an hourglass and dashed edge; outlier uses an offset marker.
mechanics.successVisual: Required report set produces a bounded aggregate card.
mechanics.failureVisual: Insufficient, stale, or unsupported reports remain outside the consumer gate.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Fresh report count, source diversity, and accepted range.
mechanics.portalStyle: Consumer-contract gate with freshness and quorum sockets.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Fictional weather or sensor report card, never a price feed.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Stale timestamp, unsupported source, or outlier warning.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Aggregation lens shows empty required-source slots.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Aggregate card becomes solid after all checks.
mechanics.animationFailure: Rejected reports align beside their reason labels.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Use a static source table with value, freshness, support, and decision.

mechanics.idleVisual: Two geometric reserve chambers connected by an invariant track.
mechanics.activeVisual: Abstract blue and amber units move in opposite directions.
mechanics.warningVisual: Scenario slippage bound appears as a hatched forbidden band.
mechanics.successVisual: Updated reserves settle on the displayed teaching invariant.
mechanics.failureVisual: Requested output crosses the bound and the swap remains uncommitted.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Fictional reserve units, requested input, bounded output, and invariant check.
mechanics.portalStyle: Two-sided pool gate with no currency or token symbols.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Abstract reserve droplets represented by shapes, not coins.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Insufficient-liquidity band or unsafe minimum-output marker.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Requested reserve changes preview as outlines.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Reserve fills settle once without celebratory value cues.
mechanics.animationFailure: Preview clears and the bound remains visible.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Show before/after reserve bars and the invariant check as static values.

mechanics.idleVisual: Proposal card beside an empty lifecycle rail.
mechanics.activeVisual: Proposal moves through pending, active, and counting sockets.
mechanics.warningVisual: Low quorum or concentrated voting power uses amber brackets and text.
mechanics.successVisual: Succeeded proposal enters a separate timelock chamber before execution.
mechanics.failureVisual: Defeated, cancelled, or expired cards enter distinct labeled slots.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Proposal state, quorum, deadline, and execution delay.
mechanics.portalStyle: Lifecycle gate with proposal, vote, queue, and execute chambers.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Proposal action card or fictional delegation marker.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Spam proposal, missed quorum, or unsafe immediate-execution gate.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Next lifecycle socket receives a focus outline.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Execution socket opens only after the delay state completes.
mechanics.animationFailure: Card moves to the precise final-state slot without disappearing.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Display the complete lifecycle as a static ordered status list.

mechanics.idleVisual: Content-addressed data cells distributed across generic vaults.
mechanics.activeVisual: Challenge marker selects a vault or recall chunk.
mechanics.warningVisual: Unavailable replica or proof deadline uses hatch and hourglass.
mechanics.successVisual: Proof verifies and a separate retrieval check matches the content identifier.
mechanics.failureVisual: Missed proof or mismatched content remains labeled separately.
mechanics.hudIndicator: Replica availability, proof deadline, proof result, and retrieval result.
mechanics.portalStyle: Vault gate with content-identifier and proof sockets.
mechanics.collectibleStyle: Data cell, proof fragment, or retrieval receipt.
mechanics.obstacleStyle: Unavailable vault, expired challenge, or mismatched content.
mechanics.animationAnticipation: Selected challenge target gains a stable outline.
mechanics.animationSuccess: Proof and retrieval checks become solid in separate rows.
mechanics.animationFailure: Failed row stays visible with its precise reason.
mechanics.reducedMotionFallback: Use a static matrix for stored, proved, available, and retrieved states.
